title: Lifecycle answers
description: The agent answers every lifecycle question. You correct it.

steps.title: The agent answers, you edit
steps.description: You never face a blank form.
steps.voiceScript: The whole point of the app is that the agent answers the lifecycle questions for you. Your job is to correct what is wrong, not to write it from nothing.
steps.captionText: The whole point of the app is that the agent answers the lifecycle questions for you. Your job is to correct what is wrong, not to write it from nothing.
steps.fallbackMessage: The agent answers, you edit: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Every phase, every activity
steps.description: All sixteen phases, in one place.
steps.voiceScript: Each phase opens to show every activity in it, with its answer already in the box.
steps.captionText: Each phase opens to show every activity in it, with its answer already in the box.
steps.fallbackMessage: Every phase, every activity: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Let the agent answer
steps.description: It writes from this programme's own records.
steps.voiceScript: Press this and the agent drafts an answer to every unanswered activity, using the programme's own description, register and design. Answers you have already saved are never overwritten.
steps.captionText: Press this and the agent drafts an answer to every unanswered activity, using the programme's own description, register and design. Answers you have already saved are never overwritten.
steps.fallbackMessage: Let the agent answer: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Edit anything that is wrong
steps.description: It is a draft until you say otherwise.
steps.voiceScript: A drafted answer is marked as drafted. Edit the text however you like.
steps.captionText: A drafted answer is marked as drafted. Edit the text however you like.
steps.fallbackMessage: Edit anything that is wrong: not visible on this screen yet.

steps.title: Save, and it becomes yours
steps.description: A saved answer outranks anything the app infers.
steps.voiceScript: Save, and the answer becomes yours. From then on it is used word for word in the documents you generate.
steps.captionText: Save, and the answer becomes yours. From then on it is used word for word in the documents you generate.
steps.fallbackMessage: Save, and it becomes yours: not visible on this screen yet.
